# volcenginecc_organization_service_control_policy_enabler (Resource)

Service control policy activation status

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "volcenginecc_organization_service_control_policy_enabler" "Example" {

}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `can_full_access_detach` (Boolean) Can the FullAccess policy be unbound?
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID
- `status` (String) Activation status, Enabled Disabled PendingEnable PendingDisable

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import volcenginecc_organization_service_control_policy_enabler.example "organization_id"
```
